19.46.en: Safe havens dwindling away like that

20.94.en: Selling off your wounds, piece by piece

22.21.en: Crying brittle, what an ugly scene

24.14.en: For someone like you, a recommendation!

26.7.en: And soon, by a sweet little trap—

27.87.en: those who take the bait get saved?

30.62.en: in a world like this anymore,

32.0.en: so wearing a blank face on purpose

33.06.en: and letting yourself go is the best move?

35.54.en: Even a bouquet dressed up in words—

38.14.en: if it steals your heart, is it the real thing?

40.73.en: the kind where everything gets dyed the same color

45.39.en: Tailor-made for an age like this:

47.83.en: a fragility in how you look

50.26.en: Fooled by a performance that's real

55.76.en: Ran out of lives ages ago ;;

60.62.en: Dodging whatever's in front of me,

81.69.en: Head, body, all smoke and mirrors

84.35.en: A coin swaying right in front of you

92.11.en: Head, body, all smoke and mirrors

94.66.en: A coin swaying right in front of you

99.91.en: No matter how you make it through today,

104.77.en: In a cycle like a Bot now,

107.48.en: carrying on these moments of inertia

110.18.en: If there's no luck and no hope,

112.73.en: well, all the more nothing to be done

115.1.en: What you don't have, you don't have — give up,

117.94.en: playing the hand with your leftovers is fate

120.64.en: Tailor-made for an age like this:

123.12.en: a fragility in how you look

125.52.en: Fooled by a performance that's real

130.92.en: Praise doesn't mean a thing anymore ;;

135.88.en: Stare reality too straight in the face
